finding_addressed: ContentStore.Append unsynchronized read-modify-write / lost-update data corruption under concurrent same-fileID Append calls

changed_symbols: ContentStore.Append (now locks cs.stripes[stripeFor(fileID)] around its critical section, content.go)
not_reworked_per_verdict_scope: boundary-condition/threshold-crossing logic (content.go Append doc comment + thresholdCrossed calc)
Create / Read (unchanged, reasoning for why documented in content.go's ContentStore doc comment)
suggested_verify_focus: Re-run the exact 50-concurrent-Append repro (now covered by TestContentAppendConcurrentSameFileID) under -race, ideally with a higher count/-count=N to independently confirm no flakiness
Confirm Create/Read's no-lock-needed reasoning in the new doc comment is sound
Confirm independent stripes array (not shared with Catalog.stripes) is the right call re: reentrancy, not just a style choice
